overall.description: A character in ancient armor holding a torch walks through a grand classical tomb corridor with stone pillars and statues. The scene is from a high-quality game engine, showcasing the 'Tomb of Alexander' with cinematic lighting and detailed stone architecture. The character proceeds down a red carpet toward a chamber with massive guardian statues.

agents.ego_description: armored character holding a torch walking steadily down the corridor between stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed corridor lined with classical stone pillars and statues in wall niches. A red carpet runs down the center while wall sconces provide ambient lighting alongside the character's torch. The corridor stretches ahead toward distant guardian statues barely visible in the warm torchlight.

events.description: text 'Tomb of Alexander' appears on screen identifying the location

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the corridor gradually opens toward the guardian statues ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the tomb, the stone pillars fall behind as the character approaches the distant guardian statues. The text 'Tomb of Alexander' appears on screen. The corridor remains enclosed with the red carpet continuing forward, while the niche statues pass by on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tomb chamber with colossal guardian statues

events.description: character reaches the end of the corridor entering the main tomb chamber with the sarcophagus

agents.ego_description: approaching the altar at the end of the tomb between two massive stone guardians

entered.detail: stone sarcophagus on a raised platform at the chamber end
burning brazier at the base of the left guardian statue
burning brazier at the base of the right guardian statue

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a chamber where two colossal guardian statues flank the path, creating a semi-covered space. The character approaches the altar and sarcophagus at the tomb's end, passing burning side braziers. The red carpet leads directly to the central sarcophagus between the massive stone guardians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow, torch-lit corridor that gradually expands into a grand ceremonial chamber. It begins with the character walking along a red carpet lined by classical stone pillars and statues tucked into wall niches, with the warm glow of a torch and wall sconces illuminating the path. As the character moves deeper into the tomb, the pillars fall away and the text Tomb of Alexander appears on screen while the corridor maintains its enclosed feel. The scene then opens into a vast space where two colossal guardian statues flank the path, shifting the environment from a tight hallway to a semi-covered hall. Finally, the camera follows the red carpet past burning side braziers, leading directly toward a central altar and sarcophagus at the tomb's end.
